Hero.subtitle_prefix: If the tables are full but the cash isn't growing, your restaurant
Hero.subtitle_suffix: . I stop that leak from outside your operation, without stepping into your kitchen or interfering with your daily management.
Hero.subtitle: A platform for team routines, recipes, inventory and core numbers, built for owners and chef-owners still close to daily service.
Hero.cta_primary: I want to hear from you
Hero.support: Early stage. Early access and close contact.

FounderBanner.text: • REAL KITCHENS • CLEAR SYSTEMS • LESS FIREFIGHTING • MORE CONTROL •

About.title: Le Sous Chef is built between service and systems.
About.description1: We are a team that knows small brigades, tight inventory and weeks where almost everything still depends on the chef or owner.
About.quote: "You don't need another layer of bureaucracy. You need more clarity to run the kitchen better."
About.description2: That is why we are building a tool that fits the way independent kitchens already work: it brings order to recipes, inventory, team routines and numbers without asking you to become software admin.
About.image_quote: Real kitchens up front. Clear systems underneath.
About.principle_1: Built for independent kitchens and small groups.
About.principle_2: Made for teams that still work close to service.
About.principle_3: Designed to protect margins without adding desk time.

Methodology.title: A clearer operating base with less daily chaos.
Methodology.subtitle: Le Sous Chef is not here to replace your judgement. It is here to organize operations so your team can work with more structure and visibility.

01.title: We understand your operation
01.desc: We look at how your kitchen works today: team routines, recipes, inventory and service flow.

02.title: We organize the base
02.desc: We structure the key information so the team has context and the business has more clarity.

03.title: You operate with more control
03.desc: When access opens, we stay close through implementation so using it does not mean more bureaucracy.

Methodology.footnote: Early stage also means more proximity: less commercial noise and more useful conversation about whether it fits your kitchen.

Includes.title: Everything needed to organize operations without turning them into heavy software.
Includes.intro: Built for kitchens where the chef or owner is still close to service and needs more structure to delegate, train the team and protect margins.

01.title: Operational order
01.body: Bring together what is currently scattered across paper, WhatsApp, memory and loose spreadsheets.
01.detail: Routines, context and less daily firefighting.

02.title: Recipes and inventory
02.body: Make recipes, yields, ingredients and stock movement clearer so the team works with less improvisation.
02.detail: More consistency in cooking and purchasing.

03.title: Team and training
03.body: Give the brigade a clearer base to execute, learn and depend less on a single person.

04.title: Clearer numbers
04.body: Understand costs, inventory and margins without opening ten files or living at a desk.
04.detail: More judgement to decide what matters first.

Waitlist.title: If Le Sous Chef could help your kitchen, we'll reach out when access opens.
Waitlist.subtitle: We're finishing the product now. That lets us stay close to kitchens that want early access, want to see if it's a fit, and want to help shape it.
Waitlist.benefit_1: Early access for kitchens with real interest.
Waitlist.benefit_2: Direct contact when we have something concrete to show.
Waitlist.benefit_3: A closer stage for understanding how you operate today.
Waitlist.submit: I want to hear from you
Waitlist.note: No spam. We only write when there is something relevant for your kitchen.
Waitlist.successBody: We received your details. We'll reach out when access opens or when we have something concrete to show.

solutions.intro: Three systems, each built to fix a specific restaurant problem and improve profitability.

audit.title: Digital Audit for Restaurants
audit.subtitle: See where potential guests drop off before booking — and how to turn them into reservations.
audit.problem: People find you online but too few reserve. Heavy dependence on aggregators and no clear view of which channel really brings money.
features: Audit of Google, website, social and booking flow
Detection of drop-offs from search to seated guest
audit.result: A simple roadmap to grow direct bookings and reduce dependency on third parties.
audit.target: For restaurants that want more guests at tables, not just more likes.

noshow.title: No-Show Killer
noshow.subtitle: A practical system to cut no-shows without hurting the guest experience.
noshow.problem: Tables are blocked, staff is ready, and some guests never arrive. Silent revenue leaks every service.
features: No-show analysis by day, time and channel
Reservation policy design for your team
noshow.result: More tables actually occupied and less stress around reservations.
noshow.target: For busy restaurants with recurring no-show problems.

efficiency.title: Efficiency Pro
efficiency.subtitle: Uncover margin hidden in your menu and daily operation.
efficiency.problem: Food cost feels high, best-sellers don’t always leave profit, and inventory is managed mostly by feel.
features: Menu engineering to decide what to push or fix
Detection of low or negative margin dishes
Simple simulations of price and menu changes
efficiency.result: Decisions based on numbers, with more margin per service without blindly increasing volume.
efficiency.target: For restaurants that already sell but don’t fully maximize profitability.

results.title: System results in real restaurants.
results.subtitle: What similar restaurants have achieved after replacing guesswork with data-driven decisions. Actual results depend on starting point and execution.

0.title: Why your star dish is ruining you?

1.title: The lie of full tables: How to lose money with a full house.

2.title: Silent Operation: Optimize your margin without attracting attention.

Footer.subtitle: Every day you open without control, your profit evaporates. Let's bulletproof your business today.
Footer.brand_desc: High-precision consulting. No smoke, no invasion. Systems that transform data into real margins for owners who want to earn more.

Metadata.title: Operations software for independent kitchens
Metadata.description: Bring order to kitchen operations, understand your numbers and work with more control. Built for owners and chef-owners of independent restaurants.
Metadata.keywords: operations software kitchen, independent restaurant management, recipes inventory margins, chef owner software, le sous chef

ShieldCalculator.upgrade_desc: Get the precise calculation (occupancy, seasons) and the copy-paste WhatsApp script to reduce this by 40%.
ShieldCalculator.email_desc: I will send you the Advanced Calculator and the Anti-No-Show Script immediately.

ShieldSection.description: Every empty table is money you never get back. Use the calculator to see exactly how much your 'no-shows' are costing you annually, and get the tool to stop it.

RadarQuiz.intro_desc: 70% of diners decide online before walking in. If your digital footprint is weak, you are losing customers to the competition right now.
RadarQuiz.q1_gmaps: Do you show up on Google Maps when searching for 'restaurant near me'?
RadarQuiz.q2_menu: Is your menu updated with photos from the last 60 days?
RadarQuiz.q3_reviews: Do you respond to negative reviews in less than 24h?
RadarQuiz.q4_rating: Is your average rating above 4.3 stars?
RadarQuiz.q5_speed: Does your website load in under 3 seconds on mobile?
RadarQuiz.gate_desc: Where should we send your full Digital Visibility Report?
RadarQuiz.desc_visible: Great work. You act like a Pro. Let's optimize margins now.
RadarQuiz.desc_partial: You are losing money. Customers find you, but choose someone else.
RadarQuiz.desc_invisible: Emergency. You simply do not exist for the modern diner.

ControlQualify.intro_title: Do you own your business, or does it own you?
ControlQualify.intro_desc: Most restaurateurs are employees of their own restaurant. Working double, earning half. The Pioneer Program installs control systems so you reclaim your life.
ControlQualify.q2_title: What is your average monthly revenue?
ControlQualify.q3_title: What keeps you awake at night?
ControlQualify.q4_title: Last step. Where should we send the audit?
ControlQualify.q4_desc: We will analyze your profile and if you fit, we'll contact you for a free strategy session.
ControlQualify.success_desc: We have successfully received your data. Our team will review your profile within the next 24 hours.

meta.title: Operational Audit — Le Sous Chef
meta.description: 20 questions. Your kitchen answers. An honest read of where you're solid and where margin is leaking.

intro.title: 20 questions. Your kitchen answers.
intro.description: An honest run-through of six operational areas in your restaurant. At the end you see where you're solid and where margin is leaking. No fluff. No sign-up.

bullets.0: 20 questions across six areas: costs, kitchen, front of house, team, digital, legal.
bullets.1: Six to eight minutes. You can answer from your phone, even between services.
bullets.2: The result lands in your inbox. We only keep your email and your score.

costos.name: Costs
costos.description: Recipe costing, food cost and real margin.

questions.costos-1: Do you have an up-to-date recipe costing sheet for every dish on the menu?
questions.costos-2: Do you know your real food cost from last week — not estimated?
questions.costos-3: Do you review supplier prices at least every 90 days?
questions.costos-4: Do you know today which three dishes leave the thinnest margin?
questions.cocina-1: Are pass recipes written down and accessible to the whole brigade?
questions.cocina-2: Do you track waste and write-offs every service?
questions.cocina-3: Does your physical inventory reconcile with the digital count at least once a month?
questions.sala-1: Do you measure no-shows and cancellations per booking channel?
questions.sala-2: Is your reservation and deposit policy written down and applied by the whole front of house?
questions.sala-3: Do you know this week's average check per service without opening ten files?
questions.equipo-1: Does each station have a clear shift owner?
questions.equipo-2: Can you hand off a full service without being on the pass yourself?
questions.equipo-3: Does onboarding a new cook take less than a week?
questions.equipo-4: Does the brigade know what to do if you or the chef are out for a day?
questions.digital-1: Is your Google Business Profile up to date — hours, menu and photos from the last 60 days?
questions.digital-2: Do you reply to reviews, good and bad, within 48 hours?
questions.digital-3: Each month, do you know which channel brings you the most direct bookings?
questions.legal-1: Are contracts and actual team hours up to date?
questions.legal-2: Are HACCP and allergen traceability documented and accessible?
questions.legal-3: Are you current on licenses, insurance and activity registrations?

capture.title: Where should we send your diagnosis?
capture.description: We only keep your email and your score. We don't share it with anyone and we don't flood your inbox.
capture.privacy_note: No spam. We only write when we open access to Le Sous Chef or have something concrete and useful for your operation.
capture.error: We couldn't send your diagnosis. Try again in a minute.
capture.rate_limit: We already sent a diagnosis to that email today. Check your inbox.

results.title: Where your operation stands today.
results.weak_description: The lowest-scoring areas return money fastest when you fix them first.
results.no_weak: Nothing is in the red. Your operational base is in order.
results.cta_primary: Let me know when Le Sous Chef opens

teaser.title: 20 questions. Your kitchen answers.
teaser.description: Six operational areas. Six or seven minutes. An honest read of where you're solid and where margin is leaking.
